name: Public Route Eligibility Candidate State Model v1
transition_rules: no automatic transition to route creation
eligibility_validated may transition only to eligible_for_route_creation_sprint
eligible_for_route_creation_sprint still requires separate future route creation governance
blocked states require correction and validation before reconsideration
non_authorization_statement: No route eligibility state may create a route, sitemap entry, navigation link, engine, classifier, upload surface, scoring interface, API, analytics layer, deployment change, or public release.
